dialogos.texto_en: (This is the place she specified.\n Somewhere around here%p-2;――%p;)
(...Found her!)
...Who am I?
It's Itsuki.
...Correct.
Ah, I see.\nSo that's what it is...
What do you think of me, Itsuki?
And what exactly does that mean?
...You should understand something\nlike that too, right?
Um, no?\nI can't answer such a vague question.
Oh, I see.\nThen I'll have to say it clearly.
I like you, Itsuki.
...I wonder, why me?
Exactly.\nI wonder why.
But what I DO know is that\nI need you.
Whenever I was lost,\nyou always helped me find my way.
Even during this trip.\nwhen you asked me this question...\nI was able to make up my mind.
Ah...\nSo you did say it,\nback then...
Well, I struggled with the quintuplets game,\nbut I was able to remember the most important thing\nat the last moment.
And, I found my answer.\nThe special someone to me%p-2;――
It's you, Itsuki.
I don't know how you felt or what your intentions were,\nbut thanks to you,\nI was able to find my way.
That's why...\nI want to be someone\nwho can show you the way when you're lost.
...Itsuki?
...I never expected this day would come.
Huh?
To be honest, I had completely different intentions\nuntil before the trip.
Is that so?
Regarding the quintuplets game and the other stuff,\nI feel like I've done a lot of things\nthat I should apologize for.
Don't worry about any of that.\nLike I said before, thanks to that,\nI was able to move forward.
...It's really strange, isn't it?\nI have no idea what will happen,\nor why...things turned out this way.
You may not know, but%p-2;――
During these past few days,\nI've been organizing and reflecting\non my own feelings, just like you.
The things you and everyone else were feeling.\nI came to know many emotions that I couldn't grasp,\nand it troubled me, confused me.
I can't believe that the conclusion I reached\nis the same as yours.
Huh...\nSo, that means...
Yes.\nI also think of you as a special person.
Really...
I wouldn't joke at a time like this.
Haha, I see...\nYeah, that's right...
My goodness...\nI really do wonder why.
But, what I've realized is\nthat I also need you.
You've pushed me forward countless times too,\nhaven't you?
Even when we were struggling to study for the exams,\nand when the bond between sisters\nwas about to break...
Even when I was lost\nin choosing my path after graduation,\nyou showed me the way.
During that time,\na feeling was born within my heart.\nAnd through this trip, I finally realized this.
To me, Uesugi-kun, your existence is special.
You're the ideal teacher, a dear friend I respect,\nand a man that I love%p-2;――
Before I knew it, you took hold of all of my feelings.\nYou...are truly a troublesome person.
...W-well, if you put it like that,\nyou've given me a lot of trouble, too.
Well, whatever.\nYou're...quite similar, aren't you?
Teehee!\nIt took us this long to realize it, didn't it?
Yeah.\nBoth of us took quite a while\nto solve this difficult problem.
Well, who knows?
Huh?
I think in this matter,\nthere may not be a right answer.\nAfter all, love isn't an exam question.
Well, that may be true,\nbut even you asked me to give an answer,\ndidn't you?
Even if you had come to a different solution, \nthat still would have been the correct one, right?
What's that supposed to mean?\nAre you saying that what we're doing here is wrong?
That...\nwill be decided by us from now on.
...In that case,\nwe still have a lot of struggles ahead, don't we?
Teehee.\nI want to be able to say, in the future,\n'I'm glad he confessed back then.'
That's how I want it to be.
